name: Fresh Pear Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, eggs, and oil; beat well.
2. Gradually combine the flour, baking soda, and salt into the sugar mixture, mixing well after each addition.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract, cinnamon, and pears.
4. Spoon the batter into a well-greased 10-inch Bundt pan or tube pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
6. Remove from the pan and allow to cool.
7. Top with powdered sugar glaze.
Powdered Sugar Glaze:
1. Combine all ingredients, blending until smooth. Yield: about 1 cup.
